docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DINO DESANTIS, REGIONAL MANAGER; CHRISTY RUIZ, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF ANDREAS ROESELER APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS KOSS KLOBUCHER AND ALEXANDER BARKER. DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPTERTY MANAGEMENT APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DINO DESANTIS, REGIONAL MANAGER AND CHRISTY RUIZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH PARTIES' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,208.60 FILED BY ROESELER, ANDREAS KLOBUCHER, KOSS BARKER, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROESELER, ANDREAS KLOBUCHER, KOSS BARKER, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 2B LIVING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $2,218.60 PRINCIPAL, $325.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,544.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
